name: Scarlight: Lustbound Trials
description:
Scarlight: Lustbound Trials

Description:

⚔️ Welcome to Scarlight — a brutal, corrupted realm where combat and carnal desire are woven into every encounter.

In this RPG experience, your choices define whether you rise as a fearless warrior, a seduced survivor… or something in between.

🔥 Create your character.
⚔️ Engage in intense battles where armor can shatter, emotions shift, and enemies don't always fight fair.
💞 Use domination or cunning to overcome foes — or fall into their traps.

🧠 Game Mechanics:

  • Detailed HP, stamina, corruption & orgasm systems

  • S+Actions

  • Status effects like paralysis, lust, fear, rage

  • Leveling, gear, elemental alignments & more

👥 Male & Female characters with unique stats
🛍️ Items, destructible clothing, rest areas, XP upgrades

  • tactical fantasy experience designed for immersive roleplay and deep player choice. NPCs evolve, battles escalate, and desires clash with danger.

Once you step into Scarlight, nothing is guaranteed — except struggle, seduction… and survival.

Genre Tags: RPG, Fantasy, NSFW, Combat, Interactive Story, Survival
creator: xiyzxzy
